title: Verbesserung
body:
A streamer-friendly Minecraft modpack heavily focused on QoL and performance. Meant to be run on client and server while providing full vanilla compatibility.

This modpack features:
* [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) – voice chat
* [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) & [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) – in-game map
* [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) – far greater view distance without crippling performance
* [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) – shader support
* [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) – zoom
* [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) – shows what you're currently looking at
* [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils) – fullbright
* [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) – controller support
* [Player statistics](https://modrinth.com/mod/player-statistics) – an HTTP leaderboard
* [Discord: JustSync]([https://modrinth.com/plugin/dcintegration](https://modrinth.com/mod/discord-justsync)) – for Discord based whitelist, cross-platform chat etc.
* [spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark) – performance monitoring
* [Ledger](https://modrinth.com/mod/ledger) – game event logging (to find cheaters)
* Complementary [Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) & [Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) – well-crafted shader packs
* many mods for Optifine resource pack support
* many performance mods
* many other QoL mods
